FED'S BOWMAN: HOPES TO IMPLEMENT NEW RULES WITHIN A ‘RELATIVELY SHORT TIMEFRAME’

THE WHITE HOUSE'S LEAVITT STATES THAT THE UNITED STATES IS THINKING ABOUT TEMPORARILY SUSPENDING THE JONES ACT, A LAW THAT REQUIRES GOODS SHIPPED BETWEEN U.S. PORTS TO BE TRANSPORTED ON U.S.-BUILT AND OPERATED VESSELS. THIS WAIVER WOULD BE FOR A SHORT DURATION.

data.title: Paxos unveils daily stablecoin rewards engine for partners - switching from monthly to daily payouts for enterprise clients.
data.description: Paxos has introduced the Partner Rewards Engine, which offers daily on-chain stablecoin rewards to enterprise customers. This move signifies a shift from monthly payouts to a more frequent distribution system for all issued tokens.

data.title: Toll Brothers Debuts New Luxury Home Designs at Regency at Babcock Ranch in Punta Gorda, Florida
data.description: The latest offerings in the Lago and Sol Collections include new single-family homes with open floor plans and luxurious resort-style amenities. These properties are designed to provide residents with a modern and comfortable living experience. With a total of X number of homes available in these collections, prospective buyers have a wide range of options to choose from. The homes in the Lago and Sol Collections offer a unique combination of spacious layouts and high-end features, making them an attractive choice for individuals and families looking for a premium living space.

data.title: CACI Closes $500 Million Offering of 6.375% Senior Notes
data.description: RESTON, Va.-- CACI International Inc disclosed that they have completed a $500 million offering of 6.375% unsecured senior notes due in 2033. These notes are in continuation of the same series as CACI’s 6.375% senior notes due 2033 that were first issued in June 2025. The organization plans to utilize the net proceeds from the offering to settle specific debts under its revolving credit facility, which were taken on to finance a portion of the acquisition cost.

data.title: Osamu Yada, Personal Trainer for Los Angeles Dodgers Pitcher Yoshinobu Yamamoto, Brings Elite Body Recognition Tech "KINETIC LAB-LINK" to Kickstarter
data.description: In light of the ongoing World Baseball Classic, a renowned 35-year sports science program utilized by elite athletes is now being made available to the public. Taking advantage of the WBC fervor, this initiative aims to bring the cutting-edge training method to a wider audience. Recently announced in Los Angeles on March 12, 2026, the program has garnered significant attention. Osamu Yada, a well-known Personal Trainer associated with the Los Angeles fitness scene, is at the forefront of this venture. This development is set to revolutionize the accessibility of advanced sports science techniques, potentially impacting a large number of aspiring athletes and fitness enthusiasts worldwide.

data.title: In HelloNation, Insurance Expert Austin Murray of Cleveland, TN, Shares Guidance on Filing an Insurance Claim
data.description: On March 12, 2026, in Cleveland, an article published by HelloNation discussed the circumstances in which residents in Tennessee should consider filing an insurance claim. Insurance Agent Austin Murray from Cleveland, TN, provided insights in the article, aiming to clarify the process for readers.

data.title: Former Federal Prosecutor Surya Saxena Rejoins Dorsey as Government Solutions & Investigations Partner in Minneapolis
data.description: Minneapolis-based law firm Dorsey & Whitney LLP welcomes back Surya Saxena as a Partner in the Government Solutions & Investigations (GSI) group. Saxena's return bolsters the firm's government enforcement and trial expertise, bringing a wealth of experience from his background as a former federal prosecutor and in-house counsel. Beth Forsythe, Partner and GSI Practice Group Co-Leader at Dorsey, expressed excitement about Saxena's return, highlighting his significant contribution to the team. Saxena will be based in Minneapolis, offering clients his valuable insights and skills in navigating legal challenges.

data.title: Embedded Insurance Market Outlook: 30%+ CAGR Forecast Through 2031; Online and API-First Placements Held 76.38% Share in 2025, Reports Mordor Intelligence
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, as per a report by Mordor Intelligence, the embedded insurance market was worth USD 13.88 billion in 2025. It is expected to increase to around USD 18.09 billion in 2026 and is forecasted to reach approximately USD 68.12 billion by 2031, reflecting a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 30.37% over the projected period.

data.title: Century Communities Celebrates Grand Opening in West Houston Market
data.description: Leading the way in online home buying, Century Communities, Inc. (NYSE: CCS) has expanded its offerings to include two home collections at Sunterra Lakes in Houston. This top national homebuilder, renowned for its innovative approach to online sales, has been recognized on lists such as America's Most Trustworthy Companies and World's Most Reputable Companies. The expansion at Sunterra Lakes presents an exciting opportunity for homebuyers in the area.

data.title: Dollar General Signals Slower Growth Ahead, Stock Falls
data.description: Dollar General Corporation's (NYSE: DG) stock experienced a decline following the release of its fourth-quarter fiscal 2025 results and fiscal 2026 guidance. The company surpassed revenue expectations with net sales totaling $10.91 billion, higher than the anticipated $10.82 billion. This 5.9% sales growth was attributed to increased same-store sales and positive contributions from new stores, although slightly offset by the impact of store closures. Same-store sales rose by 4.3% compared to the previous year's fourth quarter, driven by a 2.6% increase in customer traffic and a 1.7% rise in the average transaction amount. The growth in same-store sales was observed across various categories, including consumables, seasonal items, home products, and apparel. Profit saw a significant surge due to improved margins and increased store traffic. Gross profit margin rose to 30.4% from 29.4% the previous year.
